investigationResult.summary: EC2 scheduled maintenance will restart 2 payment-service instances in eu-west-1a. No multi-AZ redundancy detected — service will be unavailable during the 4-hour maintenance window.
investigationResult.rootCause: Hardware degradation in availability zone eu-west-1a requires host replacement

findings.description: payment-service instances will be stopped and restarted during maintenance window (02:00-06:00 UTC)
No Auto Scaling group detected — instances will not be automatically replaced

recommendations.description: Launch replacement instances in eu-west-1b before the maintenance window
Configure an Auto Scaling group with multi-AZ distribution to prevent future single-AZ failures

healthEvent.description: We have detected degradation of the underlying hardware hosting your Amazon EC2 instances in the eu-west-1a availability zone.
